title: The Hunchback of Rome
writer: Luciano Vincenzoni, Elio Petri, Tommaso Chiaretti
actors: Gérard Blain, Anna Maria Ferrero, Bernard Blier
plot: Alvaro Cosenza, also known as the Hunchback from Quarticciolo (Il Gobbo del Quarticciolo), during Rome's occupation by Nazis in 1943, decides to revolt. He starts his career of rebel like a partisan against the German occupants, f...
